nodes.html: ACCESSIBILITY POLICY & STATEMENT

any.message: Element has sufficient color contrast of 10.35

any.message: Element has sufficient color contrast of 17.83

nodes.html: 1. Policy Statement

any.message: Element has sufficient color contrast of 17.83

nodes.html: 1.

any.message: Element has sufficient color contrast of 17.83
Element has sufficient color contrast of 17.83

nodes.html: The Company’s approach to accessibility is guided by the principle that all individuals, regardless of ability, are entitled to full and equal access to information, functionality, and participation without barriers.

any.message: Element has sufficient color contrast of 17.83

nodes.html: 2. Purpose and Scope

any.message: Element has sufficient color contrast of 17.83

nodes.html: 2.

any.message: Element has sufficient color contrast of 17.83

nodes.html: This Policy applies to all aspects of the Platform, including:

any.message: Element has sufficient color contrast of 17.83

nodes.html: (a) websites;

any.message: Element has sufficient color contrast of 17.83

nodes.html: (b) mobile and web applications;

any.message: Element has sufficient color contrast of 17.83

nodes.html: (c) user interfaces and interactions;

any.message: Element has sufficient color contrast of 17.83

nodes.html: (d) application and recruitment workflows; and

any.message: Element has sufficient color contrast of 17.83

nodes.html: (e) digital communications and content.

any.message: Element has sufficient color contrast of 17.83
Element has sufficient color contrast of 17.83

nodes.html: 3. Accessibility Standards

any.message: Element has sufficient color contrast of 17.83

nodes.html: 3.

any.message: Element has sufficient color contrast of 17.83

nodes.html: To achieve and maintain accessibility, the Company adopts and incorporates internationally recognized accessibility standards and best practices, including:

any.message: Element has sufficient color contrast of 17.83

nodes.html: (a) Web Content Accessibility Guidelines (WCAG) (Level AA standards) for all web and digital content;

any.message: Element has sufficient color contrast of 17.83

nodes.html: (b) Accessibility for Ontarians with Disabilities Act (AODA) principles where applicable to Ontario operations; and

any.message: Element has sufficient color contrast of 17.83

nodes.html: (c) other recognized accessibility guidelines as appropriate to ensure usability for people with a broad range of abilities.

any.message: Element has sufficient color contrast of 17.83

nodes.html: These standards guide the design, implementation, testing, and evaluation of digital content to ensure it is perceivable, operable, understandable, and robust for diverse user needs.

any.message: Element has sufficient color contrast of 17.83

nodes.html: 4. Accessibility in Design and Development

any.message: Element has sufficient color contrast of 17.83

nodes.html: 4.

any.message: Element has sufficient color contrast of 17.83

nodes.html: Enabled Talent integrates accessibility principles throughout the digital product lifecycle:

any.message: Element has sufficient color contrast of 17.83

nodes.html: (a) Design: Accessibility considerations are embedded from the earliest stages of user experience and interface design, ensuring equitable access for users of varied abilities;

any.message: Element has sufficient color contrast of 17.83

nodes.html: (b) Development: Code, structure, and content are implemented to support assistive technologies, keyboard navigation, semantic markup, and other accessibility features;

any.message: Element has sufficient color contrast of 17.83

nodes.html: (c) Testing: Digital content and functionality are tested through both automated tools and manual evaluations, including assistive technology scenarios and user feedback;

any.message: Element has sufficient color contrast of 17.83

nodes.html: (d) Review: Accessibility performance is periodically reviewed and updated to reflect evolving standards and actual user experience.

any.message: Element has sufficient color contrast of 17.83

nodes.html: The Company strives to exceed compliance requirements and to deliver a digital environment that respects and supports user diversity and inclusion.

any.message: Element has sufficient color contrast of 17.83

nodes.html: 5. Accessibility Feedback and Support

any.message: Element has sufficient color contrast of 17.83

nodes.html: 5.

any.message: Element has sufficient color contrast of 17.83

nodes.html: Users with disabilities or requiring alternative access to content or services may request assistance or accessible formats by contacting the Company’s Accessibility Coordinator at:

any.message: Element has sufficient color contrast of 17.83

nodes.html: ENABLED HR LABS INC.

any.message: Element has sufficient color contrast of 17.83

nodes.html: Email: jeby@enabledtalent.com

any.message: Element has sufficient color contrast of 17.83

nodes.html: jeby@enabledtalent.com

any.message: Element has sufficient color contrast of 17.83

nodes.html: Requests may include, but are not limited to:

any.message: Element has sufficient color contrast of 17.83

nodes.html: (a) alternative formats of digital content;

any.message: Element has sufficient color contrast of 17.83

nodes.html: (b) communication supports;

any.message: Element has sufficient color contrast of 17.83

nodes.html: (c) assistance completing a function on the Platform;

any.message: Element has sufficient color contrast of 17.83

nodes.html: (d) reporting accessibility barriers.

any.message: Element has sufficient color contrast of 17.83

nodes.html: The Company will respond promptly and work cooperatively with Users to provide accessible alternatives in a timely and respectful manner.

any.message: Element has sufficient color contrast of 17.83

nodes.html: 6. Employer Responsibilities and Accessible Practices

any.message: Element has sufficient color contrast of 17.83

nodes.html: 6.

any.message: Element has sufficient color contrast of 17.83

nodes.html: While Enabled Talent provides accessibility features in its Platform, employers using the Platform are independently responsible for:

any.message: Element has sufficient color contrast of 17.83

nodes.html: (a) posting job advertisements that include clear statements about accessibility and accommodation processes;

any.message: Element has sufficient color contrast of 17.83

nodes.html: (b) engaging in interactive accommodation discussions with applicants who disclose accessibility needs; and

any.message: Element has sufficient color contrast of 17.83

nodes.html: (c) complying with applicable accessibility, human rights, and accommodation obligations in the jurisdictions where they operate.

any.message: Element has sufficient color contrast of 17.83

nodes.html: Employers should provide accessible application experiences for job seekers and respect accommodation requests.

any.message: Element has sufficient color contrast of 17.83

nodes.html: 7. Training and Awareness

any.message: Element has sufficient color contrast of 17.83

nodes.html: 7.

any.message: Element has sufficient color contrast of 17.83

nodes.html: The Company provides ongoing accessibility training to relevant team members involved in design, development, content publishing, recruitment workflows, and customer support. Training includes:

any.message: Element has sufficient color contrast of 17.83

nodes.html: (a) accessibility standards and principles;

any.message: Element has sufficient color contrast of 17.83

nodes.html: (b) assistive technologies and user needs;

any.message: Element has sufficient color contrast of 17.83

nodes.html: (c) procedures for receiving and addressing accessibility feedback.

any.message: Element has sufficient color contrast of 17.83

nodes.html: This ensures that accessibility remains an operational priority across teams and functions.

any.message: Element has sufficient color contrast of 17.83

nodes.html: 8. Continuous Improvement

any.message: Element has sufficient color contrast of 17.83

nodes.html: 8.

any.message: Element has sufficient color contrast of 17.83

nodes.html: Accessibility is a continuing commitment. The Company:

any.message: Element has sufficient color contrast of 17.83

nodes.html: (a) monitors accessibility performance regularly;

any.message: Element has sufficient color contrast of 17.83

nodes.html: (b) evaluates emerging accessibility tools and guidelines;

any.message: Element has sufficient color contrast of 17.83

nodes.html: (c) updates practices and standards to enhance usability;

any.message: Element has sufficient color contrast of 17.83

nodes.html: (d) engages with Users and accessibility communities for feedback.

any.message: Element has sufficient color contrast of 17.83

nodes.html: Nothing in this Policy limits the Company’s obligation to provide equal access or to improve accessibility beyond minimal compliance standards.

any.message: Element has sufficient color contrast of 17.83

nodes.html: 9. Monitoring and Review

any.message: Element has sufficient color contrast of 17.83

nodes.html: 9.

any.message: Element has sufficient color contrast of 17.83
Element has sufficient color contrast of 17.83

nodes.html: 10. Legal Framework

any.message: Element has sufficient color contrast of 17.83

nodes.html: 10.

any.message: Element has sufficient color contrast of 17.83

nodes.html: This Policy is implemented in accordance with:

any.message: Element has sufficient color contrast of 17.83

nodes.html: (a) the Accessibility for Ontarians with Disabilities Act (AODA) and its integrated accessibility standards where applicable;

any.message: Element has sufficient color contrast of 17.83

nodes.html: (b) the Ontario Human Rights Code regarding non-discrimination and accommodation;

any.message: Element has sufficient color contrast of 17.83

nodes.html: (c) relevant federal accessibility initiatives and standards; and

any.message: Element has sufficient color contrast of 17.83

nodes.html: (d) recognized international accessibility guidelines such as WCAG.

any.message: Element has sufficient color contrast of 17.83

nodes.html: The Policy complements the Company’s Privacy Policy and other governance documents addressing data protection, inclusion, accommodation, and human rights.

any.message: Element has sufficient color contrast of 17.83

nodes.html: 11. Complaints and Enforcement

any.message: Element has sufficient color contrast of 17.83

nodes.html: 11.

any.message: Element has sufficient color contrast of 17.83

nodes.html: Users who believe that a failure to provide accessible services has occurred may pursue internal resolution by contacting the Accessibility Coordinator at

any.message: Element has sufficient color contrast of 17.83

nodes.html: accessibility@enabledtalent.com

any.message: Element has sufficient color contrast of 17.83

nodes.html: The Company will investigate accessibility concerns, respond in a timely manner, and take appropriate corrective actions to address verified issues.

any.message: Element has sufficient color contrast of 17.83

nodes.html: Users also retain the right to pursue legal complaints with applicable regulatory authorities under accessible services legislation or human rights protections.

any.message: Element has sufficient color contrast of 17.83

nodes.html: 12. Effective Date and Amendments

any.message: Element has sufficient color contrast of 17.83

nodes.html: 12.
